documentation.description:
Root for logging facilities
By default, a console logger is created. If you don't want it, disable it
via the access that you can get with the function Console_Tracer

simple_types.name: Levels
simple_types.code:
type Levels is (Never,
                Debug,
                Informative,
                Warning,
                Error,
                Always);

enumeration_literals.name: Warning
enumeration_literals.description: From here up, always logged even if section not enabled

tagged_types.name: Logger

documentation.description: Used to log inline in declarative blocks...

tagged_types.name: Object
tagged_types.code: type Object is abstract tagged limited private;

documentation.description:
null record;
 Should be an interface but the gnat bug with containers prevents it

access_types.name: Decorator
Object_Access
access_types.code: type Object_Access is access all Object'Class;

access_types.name: String_Access
access_types.code: type String_Access is access all String;

subtypes.name: All_Levels
subtypes.code: subtype All_Levels     is Levels     range Never .. Always;

subtypes.name: Warning_levels
subtypes.code: subtype Warning_levels is All_Levels range Debug .. Error;

documentation.description: when this is true, *EVERYTHING* will be traced.

Inlining shall cause no calls when this is false.
I have tested this; if this doesn't work something has gone wrong.

Add a tracer that will be used for all traces.
Call not thread safe.

subprograms.name: Decorate
Enable_Section

documentation.description: Section has its own level definition

subprograms.name: Enable_Section
Enable_Section
subprograms.code: procedure Enable_Section (Section : in String; Enabled : in Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: External_Tag
subprograms.code: function External_Tag (Tag : in Ada.Tags.Tag) return String

subprograms.name: Log
Log

documentation.description:
In purpose, This can be null to allow the passing of Null_Object.
This call *is* thread safe

subprograms.name: Log
Must_Log
Set_Active
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Active (This : in out Object; Active : in Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: Set_Decorator
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Decorator (This : in out Object; Decor : in Decorator)

subprograms.name: Set_Level
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Level (This : in out Object; Level : in All_Levels)

documentation.description: Minimum for a message to be logged.

subprograms.name: Would_Log
subprograms.code: function Would_Log (Level : Levels; Section : String := "") return Boolean

documentation.description:
Says if some tracer would log with this setup.
Allows to know in advance if some trace should be prepared
